title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer. To the promised land.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Now... I wonder how much I'm gonna get booed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild the second Vodka walks out
of the paddock. It's a mix of both admiration and
disdain.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh, there it is... Exactly what I expected.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Half are kissin' me and half are dissin' me. But
hey, they're all looking at me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Triple Crown tour fans. You'll be
watchin' me today.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Tellin' me not to think too lightly of the
Derby, huh? But here's the thing...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not here to take it lightly! So don't you take
me lightly either.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
choice_data_list: Right. You're not regretting this, are you?
Right. You're not regretting this, are you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! This is my starting grid. I've wanted
to stand here ever since I was a kid. And now...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm stepping into unknown territory! Anyone who
can overcome that and win is super cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm gonna do it, Trainer. I'm definitely
gonna win.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how strong my opponents could be,
I'm still gonna win and become Derby champion!
